description_long: This object appears to be a large, dark-feathered bird with a prominent, angular wing structure and a sleek, streamlined body. The plumage is predominantly dark brown to black, with some lighter mottled patterns visible on the wings. The wings are long and pointed, suggesting a species adapted for soaring or gliding. The body is relatively slender, and the overall silhouette is sharp and aerodynamic. The surface texture of the feathers appears matte with some subtle gloss, indicating healthy plumage. The animal's size and wing shape are characteristic of a large raptor, likely an eagle or vulture.
description: A large, dark-feathered bird with long, pointed wings and a streamlined body, resembling a raptor or eagle.
description_view_0: Close-up of the bird's wing and body, showing dark mottled feather patterns and angular wing structure.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated, sleek wing and the smooth transition to the body.
description_view_2: Oblique view showing the sharp, pointed tip of the wing and the overall aerodynamic form.
description_view_3: Distant view focusing on the extended wingtip, emphasizing the bird's wingspan and slenderness.
